visual_analysis.description: A brown plastic bottle with a green cap, labeled 'Caffino'. It is in front of a green can.
A green beverage can, partially hidden behind the brown plastic bottle.
A white beverage can with 'Milkis' printed on it, to the right of the red soda can.
A red Coca-Cola can, located between the brown bottle and the white can.
A brown cardboard box is behind all the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: Pick and remove the brown plastic bottle because it is blocking access to the green can.
Pick the green can, which is the user's intended target 'sprite'.
